zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Gilbert Curwen III於大約1296年出生在英國波藍德沃爾金頓時，他的父親Gilbert Curwen II of Workington21歲，母親Eda Harrington19歲。他於1315年與Avica of Cumbria在英國英格蘭結婚。他於1362年住在英國英格蘭波藍德沃爾金頓。他去世於大約1370年在英國波藍德沃爾金頓享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Gilbert Curwen III于大约1296年出生在英国波藍德沃爾金頓时，他的父亲Gilbert Curwen II of Workington21岁，母亲Eda Harrington19岁。他于1315年与Avica of Cumbria在英国英格兰结婚。他于1362年住在英国英格兰波藍德沃爾金頓。他去世于大约1370年在英国波藍德沃爾金頓享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Curwen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place called Culewen (now Colvend) in Kirkcudbrightshire. The family was early established in Lancashire, where it was often pronounced without the -w-; see Corrin and Currin .

variants.name: Corrin
meanings: Irish and Manx: shortened form of Mac Torin, from Gaelic mac ‘son (of)’ + Old Norse Thórfinnr (from Thórr, the name of the Scandinavian thunder god, + the ethnic designation Finnr). Compare Turpin . This name has occasionally been confused with Corin .

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Gilbert Curwen III was born about 1296, in Workington, Cumberland, England, his father, Gilbert Curwen II of Workington, was 21 and his mother, Eda Harrington, was 19. He married Avica of Cumbria in 1315, in England, United Kingdom. He lived in Workington, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom in 1362. He died about 1370, in Workington, Cumberland, England, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Gilbert Curwen III est né environ 1296, à Workington, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Gilbert Curwen II of Workington, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Eda Harrington, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Avica of Cumbria en 1315, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a vécu à Workington, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1362. Il est décédé environ 1370, à Workington, Cumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Gilbert Curwen III um 1296 in Workington, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gilbert Curwen II of Workington 21 und seine Mutter Eda Harrington 19. Er hat 1315 in England, United Kingdom Avica of Cumbria geheiratet. 1362 hat er in Workington, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Er starb um 1370 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Workington, Cumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gilbert Curwen III è nato il circa 1296 nel Workington, Cumberland, England, il suo padre, Gilbert Curwen II of Workington, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Eda Harrington, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Avica of Cumbria nel 1315, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Vissuto a Workington, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1362. Morì circa 1370, nel Workington, Cumberland, England, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Gilbert Curwen IIIが約1296年にイギリスクウンバーランドウオルキントンで生まれた時，父Gilbert Curwen II of Workingtonは21歳，母Eda Harringtonは19歳であった。1315年にイギリスイギリスでAvica of Cumbriaと結婚した。彼は1362年にはイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドウオルキントンに住んでいた。彼は約1370年にイギリスクウンバーランドウオルキントンで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Gilbert Curwen III(이)가 대략 1296년 영국 c벌랜드 워킨그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert Curwen II of Workington(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Eda Harrington(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1315년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Avica of Cumbria(와)과 결혼했다. 1362년도에 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 워킨그턴에서 살았다. 그는 대략 1370년 영국 c벌랜드 워킨그턴에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1296–about 1370: tany ho any amin'ny 1296–tany ho any amin'ny 1370

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gilbert Curwen III nasceu aproximadamente 1296, em Workington, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gilbert Curwen II of Workington, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Eda Harrington, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Avica of Cumbria em 1315, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele viveu em Workington, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1362. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1370, em Workington, Cumberland, Inglaterra, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Gilbert Curwen III родился около 1296 г. в местности воркингтон, кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Gilbert Curwen II of Workington было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Eda Harrington, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Avica of Cumbria в 1315 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он жил в местности воркингтон, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в 1362 году. Он умер около 1370 г. в местности воркингтон, кумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 76 лет.

sm.about 1296–about 1370: e tusa o le 1296–e tusa o le 1370

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Gilbert Curwen III nació aproximadamente 1296, en Workington, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Gilbert Curwen II of Workington, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Eda Harrington, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Avica of Cumbria en 1315, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Vivió en Workington, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1362. Murió aproximadamente 1370, en Workington, Cumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años.
